name: @openclaw/superpowers
description: OpenClaw superpowers - opinionated workflow skills for AI agents

scripts.install:skills: cd browse && npm install && cd ../qa && npm install && cd ../ship && npm install && cd ../plan-ceo-review && npm install
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:skills
scripts.build:skills: npm run build:browse && npm run build:qa && npm run build:ship && npm run build:plan-ceo-review
scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run watch
scripts.watch: concurrently "tsc -p shared/tsconfig.json --watch" "tsc -p browse/tsconfig.json --watch" "tsc -p qa/tsconfig.json --watch" "tsc -p ship/tsconfig.json --watch" "tsc -p plan-ceo-review/tsconfig.json --watch"
scripts.test: npm run test:browse && npm run test:qa && npm run test:ship && npm run test:plan-ceo-review
